test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every active workspace has at least one protected owner.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: A user may delegate only permissions they possess and may delegate.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Workspace context is derived server-side.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Direct routes remain server-authorized even when hidden in UI.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Sensitive changes require recent authentication.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Role changes are versioned and auditable.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Audit records are append-only and tamper-evident.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Support access is time-, purpose-, and permission-bound.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

Verify no unbounded query, queue, retry, export, or AI workload.
